summary: Planned conservative, non-mutating classifications for the five live PR inventory refs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard and merge/fix/low-signal closeout are disabled or not safely applicable.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with overlapping session-rename work and failing proof/checks; closure would require a clearer replacement/credit path than this plan-mode inventory provides.
Focused candidate fix remains open, but the job blocks merge/fix/post-merge closeout and requires human judgment for focused bug-fix correctness.
Draft broad contributor PR should not be closed or treated as canonical in this inventory shard; it remains related cron failure-alert work.
Maintainer-owned focused runtime behavior change needs maintainer technical judgment; plan mode should not close, merge, or label it as resolved.
Translation/glossary content correctness and the failed proof gate require maintainer judgment; low-signal closure is disabled.

needs_human: #90908 requires maintainer technical judgment because it is an actively discussed focused runtime behavior change with maintainer involvement.
#90970 requires maintainer content/proof judgment because low-signal closeout is disabled, author follow-up is active, and Real behavior proof failed.
